details: The scheme “Integrated Toll Free 104 Helpline” is an initiative under the National Health Mission (NHM), implemented by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide the general public with round-the-clock (24×7×365) access to reliable health information and medical advice through the toll-free number 104.
benefits: Under the National Health Mission (NHM), the Integrated Toll-Free 104 Helpline is being operated 24×7×365day. Through this helpline, health-related advice and information can be obtained.
eligibility: The general public of Uttarakhand is eligible to avail the benefits.

offline: The related information can be obtained by calling the helpline number 104.

documents_required: No documents are required to avail the benefits.

faqs.question: Under which mission is the helpline launched?
faqs.answer: It is launched under the National Health Mission (NHM).

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the 104 Helpline?
faqs.answer: The main objective is to offer round-the-clock health information, medical guidance, and support to the general public.

faqs.question: Who can benefit?
faqs.answer: The general public of Uttarakhand can avail the benefits of this service.

faqs.question: What kind of information can be obtained through 104?
faqs.answer: Health-related information & medical advice can be obtained.

faqs.question: Is the helpline available 24 hours?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.
